enrichment.summary: Kyle records a catch-up vlog for the previous day, mentioning he spent most of his time working on a Rome-related project (likely a map or model in Google Earth), bought a DVD player to make CDs playable on his MacBook, and watched a Netflix documentary about Rome. He briefly critiques the documentary's historical inaccuracies around character ages.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Finds it interesting but notes significant historical inaccuracies in character ages
Wants to record vlogs in the morning but struggles to maintain the habit
